title: Build a Real-World Multi-Agent AI System using LangGraph,  APIs and Memory
summary: Code With Aarohi demonstrates building a real-world multi-agent AI travel planning system using LangGraph as the orchestration framework. The system coordinates four specialized agents (flight, hotel, itinerary, final response) that work together to provide travel recommendations by integrating external APIs, persistent memory, and a large language model.
